home.title: Law Zin Chen
home.name: Law Zin Chen
home.tagline: Computer Science student at UTeM specializing in Artificial Intelligence. Passionate about prototyping generative AI applications, building autonomous agents, and crafting highly interactive digital experiences.

about.title: About
about.label: Get to know me
about.description:
Hi, I’m Law Zin Chen — an Artificial Intelligence major pursuing my Bachelor of Computer Science at Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM).

My technical focus lies in the future of AI workflows. I actively prototype generative AI applications utilizing the Gemini API and explore advanced concepts like the Model Context Protocol. I recently completed the Gemini Nexus: The Agentverse bootcamp, further solidifying my hands-on experience with autonomous agents.

Beyond writing code, I have a deep interest in PC hardware troubleshooting and gaming setups. To balance my screen time, I enjoy community photography, recently participating in a visual trip to Pulau Ketam, and staying active with streetwear and sneaker culture.

items.title: Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence)
items.description: Currently pursuing an undergraduate degree under the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX). Developing practical expertise in autonomous AI workflows, machine learning concepts, and software engineering.

items.title: Promoter & Retail Specialist
items.description: Managed daily store operations and optimized staff shift scheduling systems. Assisted customers by providing detailed technical hardware specifications and troubleshooting device issues.

items.title: E-Commerce Seller Account Manager
items.description: Managed an e-commerce seller account, overseeing digital product listings, and tracking consumer data to optimize sales.

items.title: Sijil Tinggi Persekolahan Malaysia (STPM)
items.description: Completed Form 6 (Pre-University) with an excellent conduct record. Demonstrated strong leadership and organizational skills through multiple high-level extracurricular roles.

items.title: Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia (SPM)
items.description: Completed secondary education and successfully passed the Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia (SPM) examinations.

items.title: Data Storytelling Case Studies
items.description: Competed in academic data storytelling competitions. The work involved extracting raw datasets, performing comprehensive analysis, and translating complex numerical data into clear, narrative-driven visual presentations designed to inform non-technical stakeholders.

items.title: Gemini Nexus: The Agentverse
items.description: Participated in a rigorous three-week AI agent bootcamp and hackathon. The project focused on prototyping generative AI applications utilizing the Gemini API. I gained hands-on experience designing autonomous AI workflows and integrating the Model Context Protocol to create highly capable, context-aware digital agents.

items.title: Digital Portfolio (HCI & Design)
items.description: Engineered this high-fidelity digital portfolio as an individual project for Sem 2. Built using Next.js and React, the platform demonstrates strict adherence to Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) principles. It features a sticky navigation structure for intuitive information organization, a high-contrast minimalist interface for accessibility, and dynamic interaction styles including smooth scrolling and hover states.
